stemHtml: A non-pressurised aeroplane which is fitted with 12 passenger seats is intending to fly in all weather conditions during day and night. Does it require an airborne weather radar (AWR)?

options.b: No, only pressurised aircraft require weather radars.
options.c: No, the number of seats is not high enough for that requirement.
options.d: Yes, all flights at night or in IMC require weather radars.
